hero.name: Milena
hero.bio: Communications professional specializing in strategic storytelling, multimedia content, public relations, and institutional communications across diplomacy, higher education institutions, and cultural sectors.

projects.section_sub: Campaigns, platforms, and stories that moved the needle — in diplomacy, media, and beyond.

items.title: Editorial & Institutional Writing
items.desc: Developed written content including proposals, speeches, press releases, institutional articles, and campaign content in collaboration with universities, media outlets, and partner organizations.

items.title: Platform Management
items.desc: Built an organization's entire digital presence: website, Twitter (X), LinkedIn, and Instagram, using a three-pillar strategy: authentic storytelling, cultural relevance, and data-driven content.

items.title: Media Familiarization Trip
items.desc: Rwanda's story was often told through outdated lenses. I conceptualized and led a flagship initiative inviting Qatari and regional journalists to experience Rwanda firsthand, shifting narratives toward innovation, tourism, and development.

items.title: Event Photography
items.desc: Visual documentation during MoU signings, high-level meetings, and diplomatic functions — professional, platform-ready images that support institutional storytelling.

items.title: Graphics & Visual Storytelling
items.desc: Custom graphics and visual assets using Canva and Adobe Illustrator, tailored to cultural celebrations, elections, and institutional public awareness campaigns.

journey.section_sub: Institutions that trust me to tell their stories — diplomacy, higher education, and creative industries, across Qatar and beyond.

jobs.org: Embassy of the Republic of Rwanda to the State of Qatar
jobs.desc: Lead strategic communications and cultural diplomacy initiatives while managing public-facing projects, international events and exhibitions, and stakeholder relations.

jobs.role: Acting Executive Assistant to the Ambassador (Interim)
jobs.org: Embassy of the Republic of Rwanda to the State of Qatar
jobs.desc: Supported diplomatic coordination, institutional communication, and administrative workflow during high-level engagements and events.
Assisted with public diplomacy initiatives, event support, and development of communication materials for outreach programs.
Supported multimedia storytelling, content production, and communication projects focused on youth and institutional programs.
Managed social media content and digital campaigns for student-led media projects and events.
Assisted in digital content creation and marketing communications across multiple platforms.
Supported student services, communications, and event coordination within the Student Affairs department.

education.section_sub: Across Education City universities — advanced skills in communication, social media, and digital storytelling in a richly multicultural environment.

degrees.title: BS in Communication, Major in Media Industries & Technology
Master of Arts in Digital Humanities and Societies
Minor in Media and Politics
degrees.school: NU-Q in collaboration with Georgetown University – Qatar

items.title: The Speaking Circle
items.desc: Co-founded a public speaking community that organizes workshops, events, and The Speaking Circle podcast.

items.title: Cooking
items.desc: When I'm not crafting messages, I'm mixing flavors. Cooking is my hobby, my therapy, and my favourite way to communicate.

items.title: Volunteering
items.desc: Because someone opened the door for me, I make sure it stays open for those behind me through giving back to the community.

contact.quote: I would love to hear about your experience and how we can work together.
